assertions.title: "New Game" button generates a new seed

steps.expected: URL changes to /game?seed=YYYYY with a different seed
steps.observed: URL changed to http://localhost:3000/game?seed=gxacd4veMe — seed differs from 'newgametest'

assertions.title: New game board differs from previous board

steps.expected: Board has 25 squares with specific text
steps.observed: First board: ["Mentions how much he loves his team", "Says \"this is actually really simple\" about something complex", "Goes on a tangent about design/UX", ...]

steps.action: Click "New Game" and record new board text
steps.expected: New board has different text or positions
steps.observed: New board: ["Rants about TypeScript for 5+ minutes", "Crashes out over Anthropic", "Switches between 3+ editor windows rapidly", ...] — completely different board

assertions.title: New game starts with all squares unmarked

steps.action: After clicking "New Game", check aria-pressed state of all 25 squares
steps.observed: All 25 squares have aria-pressed="false" and default CSS classes (no marked state)

assertions.title: New game does not show celebration

steps.action: After clicking "New Game", check for celebration elements in DOM
steps.expected: No celebration/confetti/canvas elements present, no BINGO text in body

assertions.title: "New Game" can be clicked multiple times in succession

steps.action: Click "New Game" 3 times in rapid succession (with 500ms waits between)
steps.expected: Each click produces a valid board with a valid seed; no crash
steps.observed: Three clicks produced three different boards: 1st has 'Crashes out over Anthropic', 2nd has 'Roasts a tech startup', 3rd at seed=CiopkKhH5N. Final URL: http://localhost:3000/game?seed=CiopkKhH5N

steps.action: Verify final board has 25 valid unmarked squares

assertions.title: Previous game is not accessible via back button state corruption

steps.action: After rapid New Game clicks, press browser back button
steps.expected: Returns to a valid previous state (previous game board or landing page)
steps.observed: Navigated back to http://localhost:3000/game?seed=opbR2Evest — a valid previous game board

steps.action: Verify page is not broken or corrupted
steps.expected: Valid board with 25 readable squares, no errors
steps.observed: squareCount: 25, hasValidBoard: true, pageText shows valid board content. No console errors.

assertions.title: "New Game" is accessible from bingo state

steps.action: Mark all 5 squares in first row (indices 0-4) using dispatchEvent
Click "New Game" button while celebration is active (via JS .click())
steps.expected: Celebration clears, new unmarked board loads with new seed
steps.observed: URL changed to http://localhost:3000/game?seed=ZnjhjBEi4I. hasConfetti: false, bodyIncludesBingo: false, celebrationElements: 0, hasCanvas: 0, markedCount: 0, squareCount: 25, allSquaresValid: true

frictions.description: Playwright click commands timeout when trying to click squares after the first click on the board. The first square click succeeds but subsequent clicks on adjacent squares time out with 'Action timed out. The element may be blocked, still loading, or not interactable.' This occurs even when no celebration is active (only 1 square marked). Workaround: use JavaScript dispatchEvent or .click() to mark squares.
frictions.resolution: Used document.querySelectorAll('button')[i].dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('click', {bubbles: true, cancelable: true})) to click squares, and native .click() for the New Game button

frictions.description: networkidle wait times out on the dev server as documented in user-testing.md. Used sleep 2000 or domcontentloaded instead.
sessionStorage accumulated keys from multiple game navigations during testing. Cleared sessionStorage before VAL-NG-007 to ensure clean state for bingo trigger test.
frictions.resolution: Ran sessionStorage.clear() and reloaded the page before marking squares for bingo

summary: Tested 7 assertions: all 7 passed. VAL-NG-001 (new seed), VAL-NG-002 (different board), VAL-NG-003 (unmarked squares), VAL-NG-004 (no celebration), VAL-NG-005 (rapid clicks), VAL-NG-006 (back button), VAL-NG-007 (new game from bingo state). Main friction: Playwright click timeouts on squares required JavaScript dispatchEvent workaround.
